response.global_analysis: The audio features a medley of 'Connect the World' and 'Breaking Dimensions' followed by an extended dialogue segment. The reference JSON provided partial lyrics for the first song; I have transcribed the full version as sung, ensuring timing matches the vocal bursts. Dialogue has been transcribed and translated (as it is in English, both fields match) with careful attention to character-specific lines and pauses. No CC tags used, and timestamps are tightly wrapped to the audio waveform.

subtitles.original: Ina, come on, come on! Ganbare!

subtitles.original:
I know the floor is nice, but...

I know the floor is nice, but...

Oh, sorry! Minna-san! Minna-san,

Oh, sorry! Minna-san! Minna-san,

subtitles.original:
...to celebrate Myth's, you guessed it,

subtitles.english:
...to celebrate Myth's, you guessed it,
5th anniversary! Woo!

subtitles.original: Yeah, nostalgic, yeah!

subtitles.original:
Putting it all together like that
is really emotional.
subtitles.english:
Putting it all together like that
is really emotional.

And it's not just our 5th anniversary, it's

subtitles.english:
And it's not just our 5th anniversary, it's

subtitles.original: Yeah! 5 years! Woo!

subtitles.original:
We also achieved so much in the
last five years, you know?
subtitles.english:
We also achieved so much in the
last five years, you know?

subtitles.original:
We had three EN concerts!
My voice cracked. HoloEN...

We had three EN concerts!
My voice cracked. HoloEN...

subtitles.original: Let's go!
subtitles.english: Let's go!

And we had a lot of friends

And we had a lot of friends
joined us over the years.

And in the end, I'm just really happy to be

And in the end, I'm just really happy to be

subtitles.original: Just... Yes!
